title: Lakbay Calamba: Digital Tourism System
description: A web platform for tourists to explore Calamba City with interactive maps and e-stamps via QR codes. Designed the UI/UX in Figma first to ensure a seamless visitor experience.

title: RFID-Based Student Discipline Tracking System
description: Web-based system for NU Laguna's Discipline Office that automates offense logging and monitoring using RFID-enabled IDs. Replaces manual books with real-time digital records. Features include behavioral analytics, automated email notifications to guardians, and secure access control for administrators.

title: SpendSmart: Budget Management System
description: A financial management web app designed for college students. Features budget creation, expense tracking, and automated reports to help users manage their money effectively. Integrated with AWS for secure cloud hosting and database management.

title: HotelOps: Hotel Operations System
description: Web application prototype for streamlining hotel operations. Includes user management, booking systems, event calendars, and secure payment processing. Designed to optimize front-desk efficiency and guest management workflows.

title: Journal Whispers: Digital Memoir
description: Mobile application developed using Kotlin and SQLite to help users capture and document life moments with multimedia support and easy entry management. Focuses on privacy and seamless offline data persistence.

title: The Recipe Room: Repository App
description: Central repository web application for storing, organizing, and sharing recipes. Built with Next.js and JSON for efficient searching and categorization. Features interactive cooking modes and dynamic portion scaling.

title: NoteMate: Class Sharing Platform
description: Flexible web application allowing students and instructors to upload, study, and collaborate on shared materials to encourage teamwork. Features real-time document annotation and collaborative study groups.

title: S&V Manager: Supply Chain System
description: Supply and Vendor management system designed to optimize supply chain processes, featuring purchase orders and inventory transparency. Automates vendor communication and stock level alerts for business efficiency.

title: NU-L Building Visualization
description: Digital visualization of the NU-L building structure and appearance using the Python Turtle graphics library. A creative coding project demonstrating procedural geometry and color theory.
